stage_description: Stage D corpus assembled (851 examples = pilot 5 + zenn 222 + adrs 238 + glossary 136 + thesis 24 + judgment 226) into train/valid 766/85 with seed=42 / val-fraction=0.1. Verification LoRA trained (mlx-community/Qwen3-8B-4bit; planned 400 iter, completed 300 due to macOS uninterruptible-sleep wedge at iter 380; 300-iter weights MD5-match the live adapter and are used as the probe). eval_compare.py run against eval/prompt_bank.yaml (40 prompts x 2 langs = 80 entries). Verdict: FAIL on both Stage D early-stop axes (loop-detection 67/80 = 84% vs >30% threshold; framework-keyword hit-rate 0.12 vs <30% threshold). Recorded in docs/adr/0005-stage-d-verification-lora-result.md. LoRA artifact is verification-only and NOT part of the deposit; corpus is the deliverable. Stage E (deposit) does NOT proceed under this verdict — defer to next session for the deposit / iterate-on-data-scale trade-off.

files.pilot.jsonl: hand-written precedent pairs (Stage A; the 5 pairs are also folded into train/valid via build_dataset.py --source corpus/v0.1.0/pilot.jsonl)

verification_lora_verdict.iterations_short_reason: macOS uninterruptible-sleep wedge at iter 380 under memory pressure; iter 300 checkpoint MD5-matches live adapters.safetensors
